# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: <your-sidecar> # replace with the actual sidecar's name
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: <your-app> # replace with your application's label
  ports:
  - number: 15000
    name: http2
    protocol: HTTP2
    targetPort: 15000
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
    targetPort: 80
